name: Wayanad Tour: Caves, Rivers & Rainforests
description: Explore the untouched beauty of Wayanad with this tour package featuring ancient caves, scenic rivers, and lush rainforests—perfect for nature lovers and adventure seekers.
longDescription: Discover the untouched beauty of Wayanad with this expertly curated tour package. This 3-day journey takes you through ancient caves with historical significance, scenic rivers with pristine waterfalls, and lush rainforest trails teeming with wildlife. Perfect for nature enthusiasts, families, photography lovers, and trekking enthusiasts. What makes this tour special: Expert local guides with deep knowledge of Wayanad's ecology, Private AC vehicle for comfortable travel, Carefully selected 3-star accommodations, MAP meal plan (breakfast & dinner included), Well-paced itinerary suitable for all ages.
